dict.string: SUBQUERY(extensionItems, $extensionItem, $extensionItem.attachments.@count == 1 && SUBQUERY($extensionItem.attachments, $attachment, ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.7-zip.7-zip-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.tukaani.lzma-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.lzma-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.lzop-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.lzop-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.lzip-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.lzip-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.lz4-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.lz4-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.pkware.zip-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.zip-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.zip-archive.first-part" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.winzip.zipx-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.tukaani.xz-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.xz-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.tukaani.tar-xz-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.tukaani.xz-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.tar-xz-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.google.brotli-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.brotli-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.google.brotli-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.brotli-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.facebook.zstandard-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.zstandard-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.facebook.zstandard-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.zstandard-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.rarlab.rar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.bzip2-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.bzip.bzip2-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.redhat.bzip2-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.tar-bzip2-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.bzip.bzip2-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.bzip-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.gnu.gnu-zip-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.gnu.gnu-zip-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.gnu.gnu-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.lrzip-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.kolivas.lrzip-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.lrzip-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "org.kolivas.lrzip-tar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.cpio-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.apple.bom-compressed-cpio" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "cx.c3.pax-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.pax-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.apple.disk-image" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.apple.disk-image-smi" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.iso-image" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.archive.lha" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.microsoft.windows-executable" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.microsoft.cab-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.microsoft.msi-installer" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.microsoft.wim-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.apple.iTunes.ipa" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.sun.java-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.cyclos.cpt-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.synology.spk-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "cx.c3.arc-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.archive.apk" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.android.package-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.microsoft.appx-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.winace.ace-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.apple.xar-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.apple.archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.apple.encrypted-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.plougher.squashfs-archive" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.servmask.wpress-backup" || ANY $attachment.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "com.rileytestut.delta.skin").@count == 1).@count == 1
